indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space lacks privacy and acoustic enclosure, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: Hard industrial surfaces are incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: no furniture for horizontal rest
indicators.rationale: There is no furniture suitable for lying down and sleeping.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The large open space lacks privacy and acoustic enclosure, and there is no furniture suitable for lying down and sleeping. The hard industrial surfaces are also incompatible with a sleep environment.
